race.comment: Open race to close out the card. DALT JAZ (12) is a very consistent campaigner who is yet to miss a place in four runs this preparation and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Rock-hard fit for this and should run his usual honest race. ALMIGHTY JAB (2) got the job done at Cairns last time out and winning rider Wiggins retains the mount. Is yet to miss a place in four starts around this circuit and has to be included in calculations. AGED CARE (5) is one from one over this track and trip and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. Top-three contender on best form. RUSSIAN MINT (1) has a stack of weight but is a four-time winner at this circuit and shouldn't be taken lightly. CORBUSIER (3) is better than the first-up effort suggests and can bounce right back.
